sub_modules.fp_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 field extraction and zero/infinity/NaN classification.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Combinational handling for NaN propagation, infinities, invalid infinity cancellation, and signed zero special cases.
sub_modules.fp_add_core: Combinational single-precision add/sub datapath for finite operands, including alignment, magnitude add/subtract, normalization, round-to-nearest-even, overflow, underflow, and denormal handling.
sub_modules.fp_result_pack: Combinational final result selector between special-case result and normal arithmetic result.
